# Device DER files are generated by tools/gen_dev_certs.sh and gitignored.
# Run:  bash tools/gen_dev_certs.sh
# before building, or the EMBED_FILES step will fail with a clear error.

idf_component_register(
    SRCS "dsp_identity.c"
    INCLUDE_DIRS "include"
    REQUIRES dsp_config mbedtls
    EMBED_FILES
        "certs/device_cert.der"
        "certs/device_key.der"
)
